lines.gurmukhi: ਅਗਮ ਅਗੋਚਰ ਕਿਛੁ ਮਿਤਿ ਨਹੀ ਜਾਨੀ ॥
lines.translit: agam agochar kichh mit nahee jaanee |
lines.english: The limits of the Inaccessible and Unfathomable Lord cannot be known.

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਸ ਮਨੋਰਥੁ ਪੂਰਨੁ ਹੋਵੈ ਭੇਟਤ ਗੁਰ ਦਰਸਾਇਆ ਜੀਉ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: aas manorath pooran hovai bhettat gur darasaaeaa jeeo |2|
lines.english: His hopes and desires are fulfilled, when he gains the Blessed Vision of the Guru's Darshan. ||2||
To the Saadh Sangat, the Company of the Holy, shall be rid of the cycle of birth and death.

lines.gurmukhi: ਖੁਦੀ ਮਿਟੀ ਚੂਕਾ ਭੋਲਾਵਾ ਗੁਰਿ ਮਨ ਹੀ ਮਹਿ ਪ੍ਰਗਟਾਇਆ ਜੀਉ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: khudee mittee chookaa bholaavaa gur man hee meh pragattaaeaa jeeo |3|
lines.english: Thus, their egos are erased, and their doubts are dispelled. The Guru has enlightened their minds. ||3||
The seekers, the Siddhas, those beings of miraculous spiritual powers, and the spiritual teachers, all meditate on Him.
I chant the Name of the Lord, the Treasure of bliss,
Joy, salvation, intuitive peace and poise.
Maajh, Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਹੋਇ ਕ੍ਰਿਪਾਲੁ ਸੁਆਮੀ ਅਪਨਾ ਨਾਉ ਨਾਨਕ ਘਰ ਮਹਿ ਆਇਆ ਜੀਉ ॥੪॥੨੫॥੩੨॥
lines.translit: hoe kripaal suaamee apanaa naau naanak ghar meh aaeaa jeeo |4|25|32|
lines.english: When my Lord and Master blessed me with His Mercy, O Nanak, then His Name entered the home of my mind. ||4||25||32||
You are my Beloved, my Lord and Master, Utterly Great.
Hearing of You, I live.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤੁਮਰੇ ਕਰਤਬ ਤੁਮ ਹੀ ਜਾਣਹੁ ਤੁਮਰੀ ਓਟ ਗੋੁਪਾਲਾ ਜੀਉ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: tumare karatab tum hee jaanahu tumaree ott goupaalaa jeeo |1|
lines.english: You alone know Your Ways; I grasp Your Support, Lord of the World. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਭੇਟਤ ਸੰਗਿ ਸਾਧ ਸੰਤਨ ਕੈ ਸਦਾ ਜਪਉ ਦਇਆਲਾ ਜੀਉ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: bhettat sang saadh santan kai sadaa jpau deaalaa jeeo |2|
lines.english: Joining the Saadh Sangat, the Company of the Holy, I meditate forever on the Merciful Lord. ||2||
Singing Your Glorious Praises, my mind is rejuvenated.
Hearing Your Sermon, all filth is removed.

lines.gurmukhi: ਇਹ ਮਤਿ ਗੁਰ ਪ੍ਰਸਾਦਿ ਮਨਿ ਧਾਰਉ ॥
lines.translit: eih mat gur prasaad man dhaarau |
lines.english: This understanding has been implanted within my mind, by Guru's Grace.
I dwell on my God with each and every breath.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤੁਮਰੀ ਕ੍ਰਿਪਾ ਤੇ ਹੋਇ ਪ੍ਰਗਾਸਾ ਸਰਬ ਮਇਆ ਪ੍ਰਤਿਪਾਲਾ ਜੀਉ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: tumaree kripaa te hoe pragaasaa sarab meaa pratipaalaa jeeo |3|
lines.english: By Your Grace, the Divine Light has dawned. The Merciful Lord cherishes everyone. ||3||
True, True, True is that God.
Forever, forever and ever, He Himself is.

lines.gurmukhi: ਚਲਿਤ ਤੁਮਾਰੇ ਪ੍ਰਗਟ ਪਿਆਰੇ ਦੇਖਿ ਨਾਨਕ ਭਏ ਨਿਹਾਲਾ ਜੀਉ ॥੪॥੨੬॥੩੩॥
lines.translit: chalit tumaare pragatt piaare dekh naanak bhe nihaalaa jeeo |4|26|33|
lines.english: Your Playful Ways are revealed, O my Beloved. Beholding them, Nanak is enraptured. ||4||26||33||
By His Command, the rain begins to fall.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੀਤਲ ਸਾਂਤਿ ਸਹਜ ਸੁਖੁ ਪਾਇਆ ਠਾਢਿ ਪਾਈ ਪ੍ਰਭਿ ਆਪੇ ਜੀਉ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: seetal saant sehaj sukh paaeaa tthaadt paaee prabh aape jeeo |1|
lines.english: Serene tranquility and peaceful ease have come; God Himself has brought a deep and profound peace. ||1||
Maajh, Fifth Mehl:
The Saints and friends have met to chant the Naam.
Granting His Grace, God has satisfied all.
God has produced everything in great abundance.

lines.gurmukhi: ਦਾਤਿ ਕਰਹੁ ਮੇਰੇ ਦਾਤਾਰਾ ਜੀਅ ਜੰਤ ਸਭਿ ਧ੍ਰਾਪੇ ਜੀਉ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: daat karahu mere daataaraa jeea jant sabh dhraape jeeo |2|
lines.english: Bless us with Your Gifts, O my Great Giver. All beings and creatures are satisfied. ||2||
True is the Master, and True is His Name.
By Guru's Grace, I meditate forever on Him.
With each and every breath, Nanak praises the Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਨਮ ਮਰਣ ਭੈ ਕਾਟੇ ਮੋਹਾ ਬਿਨਸੇ ਸੋਗ ਸੰਤਾਪੇ ਜੀਉ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: janam maran bhai kaatte mohaa binase sog santaape jeeo |3|
lines.english: The fear of birth and death has been dispelled; emotional attachment, sorrow and suffering have been erased. ||3||
Meditating in remembrance on the Name, all bonds are cut away.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪੂਰਨ ਆਸ ਕਰੀ ਖਿਨ ਭੀਤਰਿ ਹਰਿ ਹਰਿ ਹਰਿ ਗੁਣ ਜਾਪੇ ਜੀਉ ॥੪॥੨੭॥੩੪॥
lines.translit: pooran aas karee khin bheetar har har har gun jaape jeeo |4|27|34|
lines.english: One's hopes are fulfilled in an instant, chanting the Glorious Praises of the Lord, Har, Har, Har. ||4||27||34||
let us join together and sing the Glorious Praises of the Inaccessible and Infinite Lord.
Come, dear friends, Saints and companions:
Maajh, Fifth Mehl:
The sins of countless incarnations depart,

lines.gurmukhi: ਗਾਵਤ ਸੁਣਤ ਸਭੇ ਹੀ ਮੁਕਤੇ ਸੋ ਧਿਆਈਐ ਜਿਨਿ ਹਮ ਕੀਏ ਜੀਉ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: gaavat sunat sabhe hee mukate so dhiaaeeai jin ham kee jeeo |1|
lines.english: Those who sing and hear these praises are liberated, so let us meditate on the One who created us. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਿਮਰਿ ਸਾਹਿਬੁ ਸੋ ਸਚੁ ਸੁਆਮੀ ਰਿਜਕੁ ਸਭਸੁ ਕਉ ਦੀਏ ਜੀਉ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: simar saahib so sach suaamee rijak sabhas kau dee jeeo |2|
lines.english: So meditate on that Lord, our True Lord and Master, who gives sustenance to all. ||2||
and we receive the fruits of the mind's desires.
Chanting the Naam, all pleasures are obtained.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਭੁ ਭਉ ਬਿਨਸੈ ਹਰਿ ਹਰਿ ਧਿਆਈਐ ॥
lines.translit: sabh bhau binasai har har dhiaaeeai |
lines.english: All fears are erased, meditating on the Name of the Lord, Har, Har.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਨਿ ਸੇਵਿਆ ਸੋ ਪਾਰਗਿਰਾਮੀ ਕਾਰਜ ਸਗਲੇ ਥੀਏ ਜੀਉ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: jin seviaa so paaragiraamee kaaraj sagale thee jeeo |3|
lines.english: One who serves the Lord swims across to the other side, and all his affairs are resolved. ||3||
if it pleases You, unite me with You.
I have come to Your Sanctuary;
